model.name: Glimmerglass Order System — Architecture
model.documentation: ArchiMate 3.0 model for the Glimmerglass Order System. A B2B pool manufacturing order management SaaS built on Next.js 15, PostgreSQL/Neon, and Vercel. Covers Business, Application, and Technology layers.

element.name: Admin
element.documentation: Internal factory/operations staff. Manages orders, production, inventory, dealers.

element.name: Dealer / Distribuidor
element.documentation: External distributor/reseller. Creates orders, uploads payment proof, tracks status.

element.name: SuperAdmin
element.documentation: System administrator. Manages users, module access, factory access.

element.name: Crear Orden
element.documentation: Dealer selects pool model, color, hardware options and submits an order with initial payment proof.

element.name: Aprobar Pago
element.documentation: Admin reviews payment proof, uploads quote and invoice, validates requirements, transitions order to IN_PRODUCTION.

element.name: Gestión de Producción
element.documentation: Admin records build details (materials, team, serial number), uploads build sheet and post-production media.

element.name: Gestión de Envío
element.documentation: Admin schedules shipping, uploads checklist and bill of lading, records final payment, transitions to COMPLETED.

element.name: Onboarding de Dealer
element.documentation: Dealer registers, signs agreement, uploads tax documents. Admin approves account.

element.name: Gestión de Inventario
element.documentation: Admin tracks finished pool stock (READY/RESERVED/IN_PRODUCTION) and raw materials (resin, gel coat, pigment) with daily reorder sheets.

element.name: Gestión de Catálogo
element.documentation: Admin manages pool models, colors, and factory locations.

element.name: Gestión de Usuarios
element.documentation: SuperAdmin creates/edits admin users, assigns module-level (VIEW/EDIT) and factory-level access.

element.name: Configurar Workflow de Dealer
element.documentation: Admin assigns a WorkflowProfile to a dealer, customizing required documents and fields per status transition.

element.name: Notificaciones
element.documentation: System sends real-time alerts to dealers on order status changes, approvals, and rejections.

element.name: Orden
element.documentation: Core business entity. Tracks pool model, color, status, shipping, build metadata, and serial number.

element.name: Perfil de Dealer
element.documentation: Dealer company info, agreement status, onboarding progress, assigned workflow profile.

element.name: Registro de Producción
element.documentation: Build team, shell weight, material usage (gel coat, resin, chop) per order.

element.name: Stock de Piscinas Terminadas
element.documentation: Finished pools inventory: READY, RESERVED, IN_PRODUCTION, DAMAGED.

element.name: Perfil de Workflow
element.documentation: Per-dealer customizable requirements (documents + fields) per order status transition.

element.name: Inventario de Materiales
element.documentation: Raw materials (pigment, resin, gel coat, chop) tracked by location with reorder thresholds.

element.name: Next.js 15 App
element.documentation: Full-stack monolith. React 19 frontend + Route Handler API. Deployed on Vercel.

element.name: Admin Portal
element.documentation: UI for orders, production, shipping, inventory, dealers, catalog, users. Route group: /admin.

element.name: Dealer Portal
element.documentation: UI for dealers: create orders, track status, upload docs, view in-stock pools, notifications. Route group: /dealer.

element.name: Auth (NextAuth 4)
element.documentation: Credentials provider + JWT sessions. Role (ADMIN/DEALER/SUPERADMIN) embedded in token. bcryptjs password hashing.

element.name: Order API
element.documentation: Routes: /api/admin/orders, /api/orders. Handles CRUD, status transitions (with requirement gates), media uploads, history, build records, pool-stock allocation.

element.name: Dealer API
element.documentation: Routes: /api/admin/dealers, /api/dealer. Dealer profile, approval, onboarding, agreement signing, metrics.

element.name: Catalog API
element.documentation: Routes: /api/admin/catalog, /api/catalog. Pool models, colors, factory locations. Pool stock CRUD.

element.name: Inventory API
element.documentation: Routes: /api/admin/inventory. Items, categories, locations, stocks, transactions, reorder sheets.

element.name: Notification Service
element.documentation: Creates dealer notifications on order events. Dealer bell icon, unread count, mark-read. Uses lib/createNotification.ts.

element.name: Audit Logger
element.documentation: Records all material actions to AuditLog (USER_LOGIN, ORDER_CREATED, FILE_UPLOADED, AGREEMENT_SIGNED, etc.) via lib/audit.ts.

element.name: Workflow Engine
element.documentation: Validates requirements (docs + fields) before status transitions. Supports global templates and per-dealer WorkflowProfiles. lib/orderRequirements.ts.

element.name: Mailer
element.documentation: SMTP email for password reset. lib/mailer.ts + lib/passwordReset.ts.

element.name: Prisma ORM
element.documentation: Type-safe database access. Uses @prisma/adapter-neon for Neon serverless. lib/prisma.ts singleton.

element.name: RBAC Middleware
element.documentation: Route protection via next/middleware + server-side requireRole/requireAdmin checks. UserModuleAccess (VIEW/EDIT) + UserFactoryAccess.

element.name: Order
element.documentation: Status: PENDING_PAYMENT_APPROVAL | IN_PRODUCTION | PRE_SHIPPING | COMPLETED | SERVICE_WARRANTY | CANCELED

element.name: OrderMedia
element.documentation: Types: PROOF_OF_PAYMENT, QUOTE, INVOICE, BUILD_SHEET, POST_PRODUCTION_MEDIA, SHIPPING_CHECKLIST, BILL_OF_LADING, etc.

element.name: Vercel Platform
element.documentation: Hosting, edge network, serverless functions. Deploys Next.js App. Manages environment variables.

element.name: Neon PostgreSQL
element.documentation: Serverless PostgreSQL. Accessed via @neondatabase/serverless + @prisma/adapter-neon.

element.name: Vercel Blob Storage
element.documentation: Cloud file storage for agreements, payment proofs, invoices, build sheets, photos. @vercel/blob.

element.name: SMTP Server
element.documentation: External SMTP for transactional emails (password reset). Configured via environment variables.

view.name: 00 - System Context
view.documentation: High-level view: who uses the system and what external services it depends on.

view.name: 01 - Business Process View
view.documentation: Business roles, core processes (order lifecycle chain), and key business objects.

view.name: 02 - Application Layer
view.documentation: Application components, services, and interfaces grouped by concern.

view.name: 03 - Technology Layer
view.documentation: Infrastructure deployment: Vercel hosting, Neon database, Blob storage, SMTP. Application runtime components shown for context.

view.name: 04 - Domain Data Model
view.documentation: Key Prisma data objects and their relationships. Reflects PostgreSQL schema on Neon.
